      参数类型为NotifyListener的org.apache.dubbo.registry中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      void RegistryService.subscribe(URL url, NotifyListener listener)
      Subscribe to eligible registered data and automatically push when the registered data is changed.
      void ListenerRegistryWrapper.subscribe(URL url, NotifyListener listener) 
      void RegistryService.unsubscribe(URL url, NotifyListener listener)
      Unsubscribe Unsubscribing is required to support the contract:
      1.
      void ListenerRegistryWrapper.unsubscribe(URL url, NotifyListener listener)
